tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read text files within the workspace root.

tools.name: file_write
tools.description: Write text files within the workspace root.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL using the real HTTP provider.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using a mock provider or the Tavily real provider.

tools.name: weather
tools.description: Get weather data with a mock provider by default and a real-provider config boundary.

tools.name: map_route
tools.description: Plan routes with a mock provider by default and an AMap MCP adapter boundary.

tools.name: map_poi_search
tools.description: Search nearby POIs with a mock provider by default and an AMap MCP adapter boundary.

tools.name: python_exec
tools.description: High-risk Python execution reserved for the sandbox executor.

tools.name: shell_exec
tools.description: High-risk shell execution reserved for the sandbox executor.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search MEMORY.md and HISTORY.md for relevant entries.

tools.name: doc_summarize
tools.description: Summarize input text or a workspace file.
